title: N2 traffic disrupted following major accident near Sedgefield Bridge
description: SEDGEFIELD - Motorists are advised to drive...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD - Motorists are advised to drive with caution near the Sedgefield Bridge on the N2 following an earlier accident that caused significant traffic delays.","html":"SEDGEFIELD - Motorists are advised to drive with caution near the Sedgefield Bridge on the N2 following an earlier accident that caused significant traffic delays."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to initial reports, four vehicles were involved in the incident, resulting in serious injuries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No fatalities have been reported. An inquiry has been sent to the police. This is a developing story, and more information will be published as it becomes available.","html":"No fatalities have been reported. An inquiry has been sent to the police. This is a developing story, and more information will be published as it becomes available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
